subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Beloved unto him for whom God hath ordained a station in the Ridván, and who hath received of the mercy of his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الحبیب الی الذی قدر الله له مقاما فی الرضوان و کان له من رحمه ربه فی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
